THE DRAFT ROOM
EST. TORONTO
Open
7 Days
Welcome to The Draft Room

Where Pub Vibes & Great Times Collide

New to The Junction, we are a pub focused on supporting the local community. Find craft beers brewed locally here in Ontario on tap and pair them alongside our diverse food menu. The Draft Room is family owned and operated and embodies everything you love about pub vibes.

Our bar is stocked with a diverse range of beers, spirits, and signature cocktails, expertly crafted to tantalize your senses. From classic comfort dishes to innovative culinary delights — prepare for a flavourful journey.
